name: PipeSecure
tagline: Periodic security scanner for the 216labs repo
description: Clones the 216labs repo on a schedule, runs Semgrep and ast-grep, and automatically opens GitHub Issues for new vulnerabilities. Issues are closed automatically when the vulnerability is no longer detected.

env_vars.description: GitHub PAT — needs repo (clone) and issues (read/write) scopes
How often to scan in hours (default: 24)
